# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    H = list(map(int, data[1:]))
    target = H[0]
    for i in range(1, N):
        if H[i] > target:
            print(i + 1)
            return
    print(-1)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
